arts.ttl: Player told he could be playing for Arsenal if he started exploiting his talent more
arts.sum: Rapid Wien striker Dion Beljo could be playing for Arsenal, if he started exploiting his talent and showing love for the game. That’s according to Sky analyst Alfred Tatar, who has hit out at the player and the Rapid Wien squad in comments today. arts.ttl: Will Bukayo Saka play for Arsenal vs Fulham? Injury news latest amid FPL worry
arts.sum: Arsenal will be hoping to welcome Bukayo Saka back into their starting XI for the first time in four months when they host Fulham in Tuesday night Premier League action. Fantasy Premier League (FPL) has passed Saka 100 percent fit for Fulham's visit to the Emirates Stadium on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Gyokeres? Zubimendi? What Arsenal's big summer under Berta could look like
arts.sum: Sky Sports' Sam Blitz analyses what Arsenal's new sporting director Andrea Berta's priorities will be and who the club could sign in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Ex-Arsenal star leaves club after being diagnosed with rare brain condition
arts.sum: After bringing his time at Midtjylland to an end, the club's vice-director of football, Kristian Bach Bak, has nothing but admiration for the departing midfielder. Former Arsenal youth star Kristoffer Olsson has terminated his contract with Danish side FC Midtjylland following a rare brain condition diagnosis.

arts.ttl: Seven players expected to miss Arsenal vs Fulham as key star returns from injury
arts.sum: Riccardo Calafiori is unavailable after picking up a knee injury during the international break. Mikel Arteta and Arsenal face a crucial January transfer window if they want to push Liverpool for the title and you can stay up to date with every breaking news story, opinion and more...

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka set for fresh Arsenal contract talks after injury return
arts.sum: New Arsenal sporting director Andrea Berta will soon hold talks with Bukayo Saka over a new contract.

Sources close to the situation have indicated that outfits like Arsenal, Newcastle United and Nottingham Forest are keeping track of the 25-year-old centre-back.
